title: useContext
description: Reads the value of the nearest context Provider above in the tree.
returns_desc: The value from the nearest <0>Provider</0> above. If no Provider exists, returns the default value passed to <1>createContext</1>.
usage_the_context_shape: The site publisher's <0>AwsContext</0> carries a region and an S3 client, defaulting to <1>null</1> when nothing provides it.
usage_reading_the_connection: The <0>useAws</0> helper calls <1>useContext</1> and throws a clear error when the value is <2>null</2>. Every publisher component reads the shared connection through this one accessor instead of touching the context directly.
in_the_wild: See this accessor share one S3 client in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
